basic_details.job_title: IIM Udaipur Head Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) Head - Centre for Healthcare Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Udaipur. Has been announced through the IIM Udaipur Head - Centre for Healthcare Recruitment 2026. Candidates who possess a Degree in Management or Engineering from a premier institute (e.g., IIM/IIT) are eligible to apply for these Head - Centre for Healthcare vacancies. The online application process for IIM Udaipur Head - Centre for Healthcare Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 29 May 2026. Candidates can download the offic

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Management or Engineering from a premier institute (e.g., IIM/IIT)
qualification.details: Degree in Management or Engineering from a premier institute (e.g., IIM/IIT).

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Udaipur Head - Centre for Healthcare Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Udaipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Udaipur Head - Centre for Healthcare recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIM Udaipur Head - Centre for Healthcare positions is 29-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Head - Centre for Healthcare post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Head - Centre for Healthcare post is a Degree in Management or Engineering from a premier institute, such as an IIM or IIT.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of IIM Udaipur.

faq.question: Q5. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position. Candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q6. Where is IIM Udaipur located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur is located in Udaipur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from any state apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification is for IIM Udaipur, located in Rajasthan. While candidates from all over India are generally encouraged to apply for government jobs, specific state domicile requirements, if any, would be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. How can I get the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link is provided.

faq.question: Q9. What should I do if I face issues while applying online?
faq.answer: If you encounter any issues during the online application process, it is advisable to contact the recruitment cell of IIM Udaipur or check the 'Help' or 'FAQ' section on their official website for assistance.
